name: linSlFSMSetStEnd
title: linSlFSMSetStEnd
tables: Note This function may only be called in the event procedure on preStart.
void linSlFSMSetStEnd(unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int stateId);
Ends the configuration of the state specified by stateId of the Slave with the identifier slaveId. The entire configuration of a state must appear within a linSlFSMSetStBegin / linSlFSMSetStEnd pair.
slaveId Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId, that was defined with linSlSimulate.
stateId Identifier of the relevant state of the Finite State Machine (FSM). Lies in the range that was defined by linSlFSMSetGlobal.
